title: Controller IO Remote Inputs
description:
Controller IO Remote Inputs

[Setup]-[System Configuration]-[Controller]-[Remote Control]-[Inputs] Page

Use this page to configure the controller remote control inputs.

Item	Description

Input
		 Signal	Displays
		 the input signal.

		For details, refer to 12.1.6 Remote Control Inputs.

Select
		 an input bit to use for the corresponding input signal. Select
		 "Not used" to disable the remote input.

For example, "Start" is assigned
		 to I/O input bit 0 in the above dialog. Select "Not used"
		 to use this as a normal I/O input.

Default		Click
		 this button to set the default remote inputs.

		First, a dialog box will be displayed asking you which type of
		 inputs to use for defaults: Standard, Extended I/O, Fieldbus master,
		 or Fieldbus slave I/O.

		You can also select the [Clear All] button to set all remote inputs
		 to Not used.

Load	Reads
		 the assigned remote inputs and outputs from a file on the PC and
		 save it in the controller.

Save	Saves
		 the assigned remote inputs and outputs shown in the dialog to
		 a file on the PC.

NOTE:  Both the remote inputs and outputs are loaded or saved together when using [Load] or [Save].
